title: CS Foundations
brief: Data structures, algorithms, memory management, and C. Understanding pointers, stack vs heap, and compilation -- the bedrock for every hardware interaction.

title: Digital Electronics & Logic Design
brief: Logic gates, FSMs, combinational and sequential circuits, FPGA basics. The moment protocols became first principles rather than black boxes.

title: Bare Metal MCU Programming
brief: STM32 register-level peripheral control -- GPIO, NVIC, DMA, ADC, PWM -- without HAL abstraction. Reading reference manuals became a daily practice.

title: Communication Protocols
brief: UART, SPI, I2C, and CAN at hardware and software level -- frame structure, clock polarity, arbitration, error handling, and timing constraints.

title: RTOS & Firmware Architecture
brief: FreeRTOS task management, semaphores, queues, mutexes -- and designing deterministic firmware architecture with clear layer separation and API contracts.

title: Embedded Linux & Device Drivers
brief: Kernel module development, platform device drivers, device tree bindings, Yocto and Buildroot. Kernel patch accepted in Linux 6.2.

title: Automotive Software & AUTOSAR
brief: AUTOSAR Classic and Adaptive ECU development, CAN matrix analysis, UDS diagnostics, ISO 26262 functional safety. Currently integrating BSW for an ASIL-B gateway ECU.
